mapper.select: select r.review_no, r.order_no, r.bread_no, r.member_no, nvl(m.member_nickname, m.member_id) as nickname, r.rating, r.review_content, r.review_status, r.created_date, r.updated_date from bread_review_tbl r join member_tbl m on r.member_no = m.member_no where r.bread_no = #{breadNo} and r.review_status = 'Y' order by r.created_date desc
mapper.insert: insert into bread_review_tbl ( review_no, order_no, bread_no, member_no, rating, review_content, review_status, created_date ) values ( bread_review_seq.nextval, #{orderNo}, #{breadNo}, #{memberNo}, #{rating}, #{reviewContent}, 'Y', sysdate )
mapper.select: select count(*) from member_tbl where member_no = #{memberNo} and member_status = 'Y'
select round(avg(rating), 1) from bread_review_tbl where bread_no = #{breadNo} and review_status = 'Y'
select count(*) from bread_review_tbl where bread_no = #{breadNo} and review_status = 'Y'
